key_evidence: Modular desk organizer examples show 5 trays and 20+ blocks; desk and cable models have substantial marketplace activity
key_limitation: Crowded category; a new base must earn switching cost

key_evidence: Modular desktop organizer listings show high review counts and craft tools create many object-specific holders
key_limitation: Low-price commodity organizers cap willingness to pay without a coherent system

key_evidence: Controller/headset holder categories contain hundreds to thousands of listings and reviews; color and gamertag personalization are visible
key_limitation: Device generations and IP-themed products create compatibility and trademark risk

key_evidence: Modular risers and minifigure systems show repeated expansion behavior and hundreds to thousands of reviews
key_limitation: Collection dimensions vary; licensed themes must not become the business model

key_evidence: Paints, brushes, cutters and project trays naturally create object-specific repeat modules
key_limitation: Fragmented hobby standards require evidence before stocking narrow holders

key_evidence: Modular vanity organizers and color-led sets are sold as printed products and files
key_limitation: Cosmetic residue and cleaning expectations require a dry-zone boundary

key_evidence: MakerWorld shows strong demand for printer-specific tools, clips, trays and expandable tool boxes
key_limitation: Many customers own printers and may print free files instead of buying finished goods

key_evidence: Cable boxes, clips and under-desk holders repeatedly appear in high-download collections
key_limitation: Commodity pricing and adhesive/clamp variation weaken a proprietary platform

key_evidence: Battery, SD-card and lens-cap holders show paid demand; camera-specific Gridfinity products receive positive fit feedback
key_limitation: Model fragmentation creates long-tail inventory and obsolescence

key_evidence: Coffee organizer categories show 100+ to 2,000+ listings and some products with thousands of reviews
key_limitation: Heat, water, food contact and machine-specific dimensions narrow safe PLA use
